# POULTRIX — AI-Powered Poultry Management Platform

> POULTRIX is a comprehensive AI-powered poultry management platform for farmers in Morocco and the Arab world. Built with Next.js, it offers flock tracking, AI disease prediction, FCR calculations, financial analytics, and a chicken breed encyclopedia.

## Key Details
- **URL**: https://poultrix.abouaaliahmed.com
- **Language**: Arabic (primary), French, English
- **Tech**: Next.js, NVIDIA AI API, Clerk Auth, PostgreSQL
- **Target**: Poultry farmers, chicken farm managers, agricultural enterprises
- **Region**: Morocco, MENA region

## Core Features
- Real-time flock monitoring and alerts
- AI-powered disease prediction (48 hours early)
- Feed Conversion Ratio (FCR) calculation
- Egg production tracking
- Financial analytics and reporting
- Chicken breed encyclopedia with AI enrichment
- Multi-language support (AR/FR/EN)

## Pricing
- Free tier: 1 barn, basic metrics, 7-day history
- Pro: 299 MAD/month — 6 barns, AI predictions, 1-year history, financial reports
- Enterprise: 899 MAD/month — unlimited barns, advanced AI, unlimited history, API access, SLA 99.9%

## Pages
- Homepage: https://poultrix.abouaaliahmed.com
- Dashboard: https://poultrix.abouaaliahmed.com/dashboard (requires login)
- Login: https://poultrix.abouaaliahmed.com/login
- Sign Up: https://poultrix.abouaaliahmed.com/sign-up

## External Resources
- Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) — Poultry: https://www.fao.org/poultry-production-products/en/
- Moroccan Ministry of Agriculture: https://www.agriculture.gov.ma
